summary: Iteration 37: Testing deposit auto-process and edit destination features. All tests PASSED. Deposit requests auto-process immediately creating a transaction (status='processed' with transaction_id). Withdrawals stay pending requiring manual Process button with captcha. Edit Destination dialog on Transactions page allows changing destination_type, assigning exchanger, selecting treasury account, and editing CRM reference and description for pending transactions.
passed_tests: Backend: Deposit request auto-processes immediately (status='processed', transaction_id generated)
Backend: Withdrawal request stays pending (status='pending', transaction_id=null)
Backend: Deposit with vendor destination auto-processes correctly
Backend: PUT /api/transactions/{id}/assign endpoint works for destination changes
Backend: Edit destination to vendor assigns exchanger and calculates commission
Backend: Edit destination to treasury assigns account correctly
Backend: Edit updates CRM reference and description
Backend: Assign endpoint rejects non-pending transactions (400 error)
Backend: Withdrawal manual process with captcha creates transaction
Backend: Deposit response includes status='processed' for frontend toast
Frontend: TX Requests page - Deposit shows 'Deposit auto-processed! Transaction created' toast
Frontend: TX Requests page - Withdrawal shows 'Request created' toast (not auto-processed)
Frontend: Transactions page - Edit button (pencil icon) visible for all pending transactions
Frontend: Edit Destination dialog opens with correct transaction details (Reference, Type, Client, Amount)
Frontend: Edit Destination dialog has Destination Type dropdown (Exchanger, Bank, Treasury, PSP, USDT)
Frontend: Selecting Exchanger shows vendor/exchanger dropdown
Frontend: Selecting Treasury shows treasury account dropdown
Frontend: CRM Reference and Description fields present and editable
Frontend: Save Destination updates transaction successfully
Frontend: 'Destination updated' toast appears on successful save
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 6676-6777: Deposit auto-process logic correctly creates transaction immediately, marks request as processed, and sends notifications
server.py lines 6255-6323: Assign endpoint properly validates pending status, updates destination_type/vendor_id/destination_account_id/description/crm_reference
Transactions.js lines 1602-1606: Edit button conditionally rendered only for pending transactions (tx.status === 'pending')
Transactions.js lines 1838-1918: Edit Destination dialog with proper form fields and save functionality
TransactionRequests.js lines 390-414: Create handler shows correct toast for auto-processed deposits vs pending withdrawals
seed_data_creation: Created test requests with CRM refs: TEST_ITER37_*, AUTOTEST-DEP-*, AUTOTEST-WD-*, EDIT-TEST-*
context_for_next_testing_agent: Deposit auto-process and Edit Destination features fully working. Key behaviors: (1) POST /api/transaction-requests with transaction_type='deposit' auto-processes and returns status='processed' with transaction_id, (2) Withdrawals stay pending until manual Process, (3) PUT /api/transactions/{id}/assign allows changing destination for pending transactions only, (4) Edit button (pencil icon) appears in Actions column for pending transactions, (5) Edit Destination dialog allows vendor/treasury/bank/usdt/psp destinations with CRM ref and description edits.
